summary: Post-refactor regression validated. Backend: 56 passed + 1 skipped (unchanged from iter-5). deploy_projects_ext.py shrunk from 1634 → 1183 lines (under 1200 target). New /app/backend/deploy/{code_review,autopilot}.py modules exist with required exports. OpenAPI registers all 4 review/autopilot routes + /key. github_token set/get/clear cycle on /api/operator/deploy/key works; GET only returns has_github_token boolean (token never echoed). Frontend: third-column GitHub-token card in Ops → Deploy keys works end-to-end — optional badge (amber) → paste placeholder → click save → success toast fires → reload shows ✓ configured (green). All 9 per-project action button testids (deploy/preview/redeploy/copy-url/clone/download/code-review/autopilot/health) render — 48 instances each across seeded rows. chat-scroll testid + module-level STICK_TO_BOTTOM_THRESHOLD_PX preserved in Dashboard.jsx. Cleanup confirmed: github_token cleared at end so operator can paste their real token.
action_items: USER ACTION: paste a real GitHub fine-grained PAT in Ops → Deploy keys → GitHub token card; then paste a real VERCEL_TOKEN to run the AI loop end-to-end against a Vercel-connected repo.
Optional (carry-over from iter-5): migrate `.dict()` → `.model_dump()` in referrals_ext.py + _create_fix_review_chat to silence Pydantic V2 deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactor is clean — deploy/code_review.py and deploy/autopilot.py are sibling submodules; deploy_projects_ext.setup_routers() imports them for route registration side-effects. No circular import issue at runtime; the children import from the parent at module load before setup_routers() runs.

github_token is stored under settings.github_token alongside vercel_token/ai_api_key; KeyUpdate.github_token is Optional[str] so empty string clears it via `.strip() or None` — matches the contract (POST {'github_token':''} sets has_github_token=false on next GET).
GET /api/operator/deploy/key correctly returns only has_github_token boolean — token plaintext never leaves the server.

OpsDeploySection KeysCard now correctly has 3 cards: Vercel token, AI key, GitHub token (data-testid deploy-key-github-token + deploy-key-github-save). saveGithubToken() validates non-empty, fires toast, clears input, calls onSaved() to refresh keysStatus.
deploy_projects_ext.py still has `@ops_router.get('/key')` reading settings.github_token directly — wiring intact post-refactor.
test_credentials: Operator rac.investments.swe@gmail.com / REDACTED — used for the github_token UI flow. Browser redirected to /setup-2fa first (RESET_OPERATOR_PASSWORD=true clears 2FA on boot), then direct nav to /operator works (cookie session valid).
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seed projects rendered in Ops tab (P2 Test Project, Clone Variant, etc.). github_token set to 'ghp_test_placeholder_token' transiently, then cleared at end (verified has_github_token=false at finish).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor passed all regression. The /api/operator/deploy/key endpoint now accepts/returns has_github_token. AutopilotDialog SSE stream halts at review_start → loop_error when no github_token is set on a public repo if GitHub anon rate limit is hit — both behaviors are acceptable per spec. The real end-to-end AI loop verification is BLOCKED on user pasting a real GitHub PAT + Vercel token in the Ops tab.
rca of the issue: N/A — no regressions. Submodule split was successful: parent stays at 1183 lines, children expose only the symbols the routers need.
